title: The Hunt for Red Dual AGNs I: Spatially-Resolved Mid-IR Dual AGNs in the DeCam Legacy Survey
comment: 35 pages, including 5 tables, 10 figures, and 4 appendix sections. Submitted to ApJ; feedback welcome!
summary: Theoretical studies predict that dual AGNs are a critical stage of galaxy merger-driven supermassive black hole growth. Systematic searches for dual AGNs typically target late-stage mergers ($\leq10$ kpc nuclear separations) and select AGNs based on optical diagnostics. Yet, simulations predict that obscuration can occur early in the merger sequence, and that a significant fraction of dual AGNs can be found beyond $10$ kpc. Here, we report on a new sample of 157 spatially resolved mid-IR dual AGNs candidates selected based upon their mid-IR $W1-W2$ colors from the Wide-Field Infrared Survey Explorer and optically classified as galaxy merger candidates using imaging from the Dark Energy Camera Legacy Survey. Spectroscopic results are presented for approximately 2/3 of the sample. 76 candidates have been confirmed to reside in galaxy mergers; among these, 13 have been confirmed as bona fide mid-IR dual AGNs, while 63 represent strong dual AGN candidates that require further examination. 46 candidates have been rejected as non-merger contaminants (foreground-background AGNs, separations inconsistent with interacting galaxies, etc.). 35 candidates still await spectroscopic coverage. The confirmed and high confidence dual AGN candidates exhibit separations of 14.5-129 kpc; $>50$% reside at separations $>50$ kpc. Confirmed and high confidence candidates also exhibit a diversity of nuclear optical BPT classes. Seyfert-Seyferts and Seyfert-HIIs dominate the overall BPT pairs sample. 31% of confirmed mid-IR dual AGNs reside in multi-mergers involving three or more galaxies. The diversity in AGN properties and environments identified in this work highlights the importance of multiwavelength selection strategies and analyses in the quest to holistically understand dual AGNs as a population.

AI.tldr: 基于WISE中红外颜色和DECaLS光学成像，本文筛选出157个中红外双AGN候选体，其中76个确认为并合星系，13个确认为真实双AGN，63个为高置信候选体。这些双AGN的间距为14.5-129 kpc，超过50%间距大于50 kpc，且31%存在于多星系并合系统中。
AI.motivation: 理论预测双AGN是星系并合驱动超大质量黑洞增长的关键阶段，但传统搜索聚焦于晚阶段并合（≤10 kpc）且依赖光学诊断，忽视了早期并合阶段可能存在的遮蔽效应以及更大间距的双AGN。
AI.method: 利用WISE的W1-W2中红外颜色选取双AGN候选体，结合DECaLS光学成像分类并合星系候选体，并通过光谱观测进行确认和分类。
AI.result: 157个候选体中，76个确认处于并合星系，13个确认为真实双AGN，63个为强候选体；间距14.5-129 kpc，>50%间距>50 kpc；31%存在于多星系并合系统；BPT分类呈现多样性。
AI.conclusion: 中红外选择策略能有效发现大间距（>50 kpc）和早期并合阶段的双AGN，突出了多波段选择策略对于全面理解双AGN种群的重要性。

title: Massive Galaxies Form Early and Gray: Stellar Assembly and Dust Attenuation at $\mathbf{z>3.5}$ from CAPERS
summary: The stellar mass assembly of massive galaxies in the first few billion years of cosmic history remains a central challenge in galaxy formation. Galaxies with $M_\star \gtrsim 10^{10}M_\odot$ observed at $z \gtrsim 4$ must grow rapidly under conditions of intense gas accretion, feedback, and dust production. Observationally, their star-formation histories (SFHs) have been poorly constrained due to degeneracies inherent to broadband photometry. The advent of JWST enables direct spectroscopic access to detailed continuum shapes and rest-frame optical diagnostics at high redshift, providing a critical opportunity to reconstruct formation timescales of massive early galaxies. Here, we investigate massive galaxies using joint spectro-photometric SED fitting of JWST/NIRSpec prism spectroscopy from the CANDELS-Area Prism Epoch of Reionization Survey (CAPERS). Our sample comprises 148 galaxies selected photometrically with log $(M_\star/M_\odot) > 9.5$ at $z > 3.5$. We find that the most massive galaxies (log $(M_\star/M_\odot) > 10.5$) preferentially exhibit shallow, gray dust attenuation curves, consistent with higher dust optical depths and large grain sizes. We also find significant diversity in the time at which galaxies form 25% of their stellar mass. While formation timescales converge toward later cosmic times, galaxies with lower sSFR ($\lesssim -9$) at the observation epoch formed significantly earlier than systems with higher sSFRs. Across the full mass range, inferred assembly times are systematically earlier than model predictions, suggesting more rapid early growth than currently captured theoretically. These results underscore the importance of spectroscopic constraints and flexible SFH and dust models for reconstructing high-redshift massive galaxy formation histories.

AI.tldr: 利用JWST/NIRSpec光谱数据对148个z>3.5的大质量星系进行能谱拟合，发现最星系呈现灰色尘埃消光曲线，其形成时标早于理论预测，表明早期宇宙中大质量星系比模型预想的增长更快。
AI.motivation: 宇宙早期数十亿年内大质量恒星的恒星质量增长过程是星系形成领域的核心挑战，观测上由于宽带测光固有的简并性，恒星形成历史受到很大限制。
AI.method: 对148个log(M/M⊙)>9.5、z>3.5的星系进行联合光谱-测光SED拟合，使用JWST/NIRSpec棱镜光谱数据（来自CAPERS巡天）。
AI.result: 最星系（log(M/M⊙)>10.5）呈现浅灰色尘埃消光曲线；星系形成其25%恒星质量的时标呈现显著多样性；低比恒星形成率星系形成更早；所有质量范围内的推断聚集时标均早于模型预测。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明光谱约束以及灵活的恒星形成历史与尘埃模型对重建高红移大质量星系形成历史至关重要，早期大质量星系的增长比当前理论预测更快。

title: When galaxies burst: enhanced shot-noise for line-intensity mapping in the JWST era
summary: Recent JWST observations indicate that star formation at $z\!\sim\!4-6$ is more stochastic than previously assumed, with rms log-SFR scatter $\sim\!0.6$ dex at $M_h\!\sim\!10^{11}M_{\odot}$, growing toward smaller halos and time-correlated on $\sim\!25$ Myr. This is significantly higher than the typical $\sim\!0.3$ dex phenomenological lognormal scatter assumed in standard line-intensity mapping (LIM) forecasts. We propagate the JWST-era burstiness through to the LIM shot-noise power spectrum and show that the result is a simple multiplicative correction: the deterministic shot noise multiplied by a line-dependent boost factor $B_λ$ derived in closed form by convolving the SFR correlation function with the stellar-population-synthesis kernel of each line. At $z\!\sim\!6$, we find $B_{{\rm H}α}\!\simeq\!7$ and $B\!\sim\!2.5$-$3.5$ for longer-window tracers ([CII], CO, UV) - factors of $\sim\!2$-$5$ above the standard prescription, and growing further toward higher redshift. The enhancement transforms the LIM landscape: it improves auto-spectrum detectability and suppresses lower-redshift interloper contamination, but degrades cosmological applications such as BAO that rely on a clean clustering measurement. Crucially, it also opens a new use of LIM as a diagnostic of high-redshift star-formation physics beyond the regime of individually resolved galaxies: redshift tomography of a single line constrains the amplitude and mass dependence of the burstiness, while cross-line shot-noise correlations probe its time coherence.

AI.tldr: JWST观测发现高红移星系形成存在显著爆发性（随机性），这种爆发性会大幅提升线强度映射（LIM）的散粒噪声功率谱（增强因子2-7倍），影响宇宙学应用的同时也为研究早期恒星形成物理提供了新诊断工具。
AI.motivation: 标准LIM预测假设恒星形成率为~0.3 dex的对数正态散粒噪声，但JWST最新观测显示z~4-6的恒星形成具有更强的随机性（rms~0.6 dex），需要评估这种爆发性对LIM的影响。
AI.method: 将JWST时代的爆发性传播到LIM散粒噪声功率谱，通过将SFR相关函数与各谱线的星族合成核卷积，推导出封闭形式的线依赖增强因子Bλ。
AI.result: z~6时，Hα线的增强因子B≈7，[CII]、CO、UV等长窗口示踪物的B≈2.5-3.5，相比标准预测高出2-5倍，且随红移增加进一步增大。
AI.conclusion: 这种增强改变了LIM图景：提高自功率谱可检测性、抑制低红移污染，但降低BAO等宇宙学应用效果；同时开启了LIM作为高红移恒星形成物理诊断工具的新用途。

title: Rapid and robust simulation-based inference for kilonovae
summary: With the next generation of both electromagnetic and gravitational wave observatories beginning to come online, rapid analysis methods for kilonova data are becoming increasingly important in astronomy. Traditional Bayesian parameter estimation using Markov chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) is time-consuming and relies on explicit likelihood approximations that can break down when modeling uncertainties are significant. We develop a simulation-based inference (SBI) framework for kilonova parameter estimation using density-estimation likelihood-free inference. The framework uses a Gaussian process emulator trained on $\sim1300$ radiative transfer simulations generated with the POSSIS code. We demonstrate that SBI provides a rapid alternative to MCMC for inference with emulators or approximate likelihoods that is robust to emulator uncertainty and likelihood misspecification. On simulated data, the SBI method accurately recovers injected parameters and produces posterior predictive light curves consistent with the data, but the MCMC posterior recovery suffers from systematic bias caused by likelihood misspecification. When analyzing AT2017gfo, the SBI and MCMC methods yield similar light-curve predictions but different posterior distributions, with a subset of the MCMC posteriors piling up at prior boundaries. The likelihood in the MCMC fails to capture the non-Gaussian, correlated structure of the emulator uncertainty, but SBI learns the posterior directly from forward simulations that include the full predictive distribution. Once trained, the SBI framework generates $\sim2\times10^4$ posterior samples in seconds.

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一种基于模拟的推理（SBI）框架用于千新星参数估计，使用高斯过程仿真器替代传统MCMC方法，能够快速生成后验样本，且对仿真器不确定性和似然误设具有鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统贝叶斯参数估计（MCMC）耗时且依赖于显式似然近似，当建模不确定性显著时，这些近似会失效。随着新一代电磁和引力波观测站开始运行，快速分析千新星数据的方法变得越来越重要。
AI.method: 使用密度估计的无似然推理（SBI）方法，通过高斯过程仿真器在约1300个POSSIS辐射传输模拟上训练，直接从正向模拟中学习后验分布，避免显式似然近似。
AI.result: SBI方法在模拟数据上能准确恢复注入参数，生成与数据一致的后验预测光变曲线；而MCMC因似然误设产生系统性偏差。在AT2017gfo数据分析中，两种方法的光变曲线预测相似，但后验分布不同，MCMC部分后验堆积在先验边界上。
AI.conclusion: SBI框架一旦训练完成，可在数秒内生成约2×10^4个后验样本，为千新星参数估计提供了快速、鲁棒的替代方案，特别适用于似然误设和仿真器不确定性显著的情形。

title: Gravitational-wave Tomography of the Moon: Constraining Lunar Structure with Calibrated Gravitational Waves
comment: Accepted for publication in Physical Review Letters
summary: The recent success of gravitational-wave (GW) astronomy together with renewed plans for lunar geophysical instrumentation has revived interest in using the Moon as a resonant detector for mid-frequency (mHz-Hz) GWs. In realistic observational scenarios, the GW strain amplitude is expected to be constrained independently by networks of GW detectors, which motivates an inverse, \emph{tomographic} question: to what extent can measurements of the Moon's seismic response to known GWs be used to infer its internal structure? In this work, we develop a first-principles, perturbative framework that maps spherically symmetric perturbations of the elastic and density structure to measurable changes in observables, especially GW-driven modal amplitudes of the Moon. The formalism combines (i) a normal-mode representation of the elastic response, (ii) first-order perturbation theory for eigenvalues and eigenfunctions, and (iii) a linearized observation model that links frequency and amplitude observables to model parameters (bulk and shear moduli, density, and interface locations) and their perturbations. We show that the estimation errors of the Moon's elastic parameters can be reduced by about an order of magnitude with observations of calibrated GWs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用已知引力波源激发月球地震响应，通过反演方法推断月球内部结构，理论框架将正常模态、扰动理论与线性观测模型结合，证明校准引力波可将月球弹性参数估计误差降低约一个数量级。
AI.motivation: 引力波天文学的成功与月球地球物理仪器的复兴，促使研究者关注月球作为中频引力波共振探测器。在已知引力波源的情况下，如何利用月球地震响应反演其内部结构是一个待解决的反问题。
AI.method: 基于第一性原理的微扰框架：(i) 弹性响应的正常模态表示；(ii) 特征值和特征函数的一阶微扰理论；(iii) 将频率和振幅观测量与模型参数（体模量、剪切模量、密度、界面位置）及其扰动线性化关联的观测模型。
AI.result: 通过校准引力波观测，月球弹性参数的估计误差可降低约一个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为利用引力波对月球进行地震层析成像提供了理论基础，展示了已知引力波源作为探测月球内部结构工具的巨大潜力。

title: Scattered light noise at LIGO Livingston Observatory during O4
summary: Scattered light is one of the most common sources of noise in the LIGO gravitational wave detectors. Light scattering is a highly non-linear process through which motion at low frequencies gets up-converted and creates noise in a higher frequency band in the detector data. From the beginning of the fourth observation run, many glitches appeared in the data of LIGO Livingston detector in the frequency range 10-40 Hz, and the morphology of these glitches suggested that they were produced by scattered light. From our analysis, we identified two different populations of scattered light glitches, one group having higher SNR than the other. The glitches of the high- SNR group were solely modulated by microseismic ground motion (ground motion in 0.1-1.0 Hz) and in this paper, we present models of possible coupling mechanisms for these glitches. We also present results of a statistical correlation analysis based on our models, which indicates that the microseismic ground motion at the corner station along the X direction is the one most correlated with the noise which create these high SNR glitches. After installing baffles very close to the test mass mirrors, we have noticed a significant reduction in the rate and SNR of these glitches. The low-SNR glitches were primarily modulated by high frequency (10-30 Hz) vertical ground motion at the corner station, and this motion was coupling through a specific vacuum chamber at the corner station. After installing an additional seismic isolation platform in that vacuum chamber, these glitches have disappeared.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了LIGO Livingston探测器第四轮观测中由散射光引起的两种噪声毛刺，分别关联微地震地面运动和高频垂直地面运动，并通过安装挡板与附加隔振平台有效抑制了这两种噪声。
AI.motivation: 散射光是LIGO引力波探测器中常见的噪声源，会造成低频运动上变频为高频噪声，在第四轮观测中出现了大量10-40 Hz的散射光毛刺，影响探测灵敏度，因此需要识别噪声来源并提出抑制方案。
AI.method: 通过形态分析将散射光毛刺分为高信噪比和低信噪比两类；对高SNR组进行微地震地面运动耦合机制建模与统计相关性分析；对低SNR组定位到特定真空腔的高频垂直地面运动耦合；分别采用安装近测试质量挡板和附加隔振平台进行实验验证。
AI.result: 高SNR毛刺与转角站X方向的微地震地面运动高度相关，安装挡板后显著降低了毛刺发生率和SNR；低SNR毛刺与转角站10-30 Hz垂直地面运动相关，增设隔振平台后毛刺完全消失。
AI.conclusion: 识别了两种不同机制的散射光毛刺，并通过针对性工程措施有效抑制了这两种噪声，为LIGO探测器噪声控制提供了可行方案。

title: Coupled Photochemical-Climate Modeling of Plausible Tenuous Outgassed Atmospheres on the TRAPPIST-1 Planets
comment: Accepted for publication in the Planetary Science Journal
summary: Available JWST observations TRAPPIST-1 system have suggested that several of the planets are likely airless, or possess a very tenuous atmosphere. However, the high atmospheric escape rates expected for these planets suggest that any tenuous atmosphere must be replenished by constant outgassing, and past studies on modeling potential atmospheres for the planets have not widely considered surface pressures <1 bar. Here, we show that tenuous atmospheres on the TRAPPIST-1 planets are likely possible, supported by constant plausible rates of water and/or CO$_{2}$ outgassing against assumed high escape rates (up to ~10$^{30}$ s$^{-1}$). We use a coupled photochemical-climate model and sample from a broad phase space of outgassing, surface deposition, and top-of-atmosphere escape rates to test hundreds of atmospheres per planet. Critically, our model also allows surface pressure to vary based on the balance of sources and sinks. We find that 6 different compositional archetypes are generated via H$_{2}$O and/or CO$_{2}$ outgassing across our phase space, and atmospheres commonly fall between 10$^{-4}$ -- 1 bar. We find that potentially habitable surface environments are possible for TRAPPIST-1d and e at pressures between 0.05 -- 2 bar and 0.5 -- 1 bar, respectively. Where possible, we compare our models to JWST observational data for TRAPPIST-1b, c, d, and e; all atmospheres found in this study for these planets match available transmission data to <3$σ$. However, emission data are consistent with atmospheric outcomes constrained to thin O$_{2}$-dominated compositions for TRAPPIST-1b ($\lesssim$0.01 bars) and c ($\lesssim$0.2 bars), which may or may not contain trace SO$_{2}$.

AI.tldr: 本文通过光化学-气候耦合模型，模拟了TRAPPIST-1行星在持续火山脱气与大气逃逸平衡下的稀薄大气形成机制。研究发现，在10⁻⁴-1 bar压力范围内，存在6种大气组成类型，其中TRAPPIST-1d和e在特定压力范围(0.05-2 bar和0.5-1 bar)内可能存在宜居表面环境。与JWST观测数据对比显示，所有模拟大气均与透射光谱数据吻合(<3σ)，但发射数据将TRAPPIST-1b和c的大气约束为稀薄O₂主导(≤0.01 bar和≤0.2 bar)且可能含痕量SO₂。
AI.motivation: 已有JWST观测表明TRAPPIST-1行星可能无大气或仅存在极稀薄大气，但高逃逸率意味着任何稀薄大气必须通过持续脱气补充。此前研究未广泛考虑<1 bar的表面压力条件，本研究旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 使用耦合光化学-气候模型，在脱气速率、表面沉积和大气逃逸率的宽泛相空间中采样，对每颗行星测试数百种大气情景。模型允许表面压力根据源与汇的平衡动态变化。
AI.result: 发现6种不同的大气组成类型；大气压力普遍在10⁻⁴-1 bar之间；TRAPPIST-1d和e分别在0.05-2 bar和0.5-1 bar压力范围内可能存在宜居表面环境；所有模拟大气与JWST透射数据吻合(<3σ)，但发射数据将b和c限制为O₂主导的极稀薄大气。
AI.conclusion: TRAPPIST-1行星上持续的水和/或CO₂脱气可以维持稀薄大气，且稀薄大气不一定排除宜居性。但发射观测数据对行星b和c的大气组成给出了严格约束。

title: Ionization Structure and Metal Enrichment of the Galactic Center Minispiral Observed with JWST
comment: Main text 13 pages, 10 figures, 5 Tables. Submitted to ApJ. Comments welcomed
summary: Sgr A* is the nearest quiescent supermassive black hole, and its proximity offers a unique opportunity to study its surrounding fuel supply. We leverage extensive spatial and spectroscopic information provided by the \jwst/MIRI MRS instrument to disentangle mid-infrared ionized gas structures in the central 0.1 parsec of the Galaxy. The Galactic Minispiral's Bar and Northern Arm are revealed by their distinct morphological and kinematic signatures. Several compact ($<1$\arcsec) gas structures including X7 also appear within $\sim 0.05$ parsec of Sgr A* in the plane of the sky, moving with blue-shifted radial velocities $\gtrsim 600$ km/s. Fine structure line measurements spanning ionization energies $\sim 7 - 55$ eV are used to constrain the incident radiation field, metal abundances (neon, argon, sulfur, nickel, and iron), and dust depletion/destruction for each identified gas structure. Overall, the Minispiral gas metallicity is $\sim 1-2.5~Z_\sun$, with a Wolf-Rayet star-driven ionizing radiation field, and significant nickel and iron dust destruction. Increased flux at energies $\gtrsim 41$ eV suggests that the compact gas structures experience an additional harder ionizing radiation source, which is most likely driven by localized fast radiative shocks from stellar winds, a hypothetical Sgr A* outflow, and/or interactions with the ambient medium.

AI.tldr: 利用JWST/MIRI MRS观测数据，对银河系中心0.1秒差距内Sgr A*附近的电离气体结构进行了详细分析，揭示了Mini旋臂的形态和运动学特征，并测量了金属丰度和尘埃破坏情况。
AI.motivation: Sgr A*是最近的宁静超大质量黑洞，研究其周围的燃料供应（电离气体结构）对于理解黑洞吸积和星系核活动至关重要。
AI.method: 利用JWST/MIRI MRS的高空间和光谱分辨率数据，通过精细结构谱线测量（电离能7-55 eV）分析气体形态、运动学、辐射场、金属丰度（Ne、Ar、S、Ni、Fe）及尘埃破坏/摧毁。
AI.result: Mini旋臂金属丰度约为太阳的1-2.5倍，辐射场由Wolf-Rayet恒星驱动；镍和铁尘埃显著破坏；紧凑气体结构在≥41 eV处有额外硬辐射源，可能来自恒星风激波、Sgr A*外流或与周围介质的相互作用。
AI.conclusion: Sgr A*附近的电离气体呈现多成分结构，Compact气体结构受到更硬的电离辐射源影响，表明存在局部快速辐射激波等额外物理过程。

title: CIAO: Chandra's Data Analysis System for X-Ray Astronomy and Beyond
summary:
The Chandra Interactive Analysis of Observations (CIAO) software, developed by the Chandra X-ray Center, has been the data analysis package for the Chandra X-ray Observatory since its launch in 1999. Over nearly three decades, CIAO has grown from a small software suite into a widely used system for X-ray data analysis and beyond.
  CIAO provides tools for calibration, spectral, imaging, and timing analysis, together with high-level scripts and the \sherpa\ modeling and fitting application. Its modular design and unified data model allow users to build flexible analysis workflows while maintaining consistency with the Chandra data processing pipeline. Visualization capabilities are provided through integration with SAOImageDS9 and Python-based tools, and simulation components such as ChaRT and MARX extend the analysis environment to include detailed modeling of instrumental effects.
  In this paper we describe CIAO's design, evolution, and capabilities after 25 years of Chandra operations. We also describe its core architecture, scripting environment, modeling, visualization tools, simulation components, and testing infrastructure, as well as the documentation and user support system that have contributed to its widespread use. CIAO's continued development and broad adoption highlight its important role in X-ray astronomy and its usefulness in multiwavelength astrophysical research.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了CIAO（Chandra交互式分析观测软件）从1999年钱德拉X射线天文台发射至今近25年的设计、演进与核心能力，涵盖校准、光谱、成像、时序分析、建模拟合、可视化、模拟及用户支持等完整系统。
AI.motivation: 为钱德拉X射线天文台提供一个统一、灵活且持续演进的X射线数据分析系统，从初期的轻量软件发展到支撑多波段天体物理研究的综合性平台。
AI.method: 采用模块化设计和统一数据模型，集成校准、光谱、成像、时序分析工具，提供Sherpa建模拟合应用，通过SAOImageDS9和Python实现可视化，结合ChaRT和MARX进行仪器效应模拟，并建立完善的测试、文档和用户支持体系。
AI.result: 经过25年运营，CIAO已从小型软件发展为广泛使用的X射线数据分析系统，在钱德拉数据处理之外也能支撑多波段天体物理研究。
AI.conclusion: CIAO的持续发展和广泛采用表明其在X射线天文学及多波段天体物理研究中发挥着重要作用，是一个成熟且功能完备的科学分析平台。

title: Constraining the Galactic Center Dark Cluster with ELT/MICADO Observations
summary: The Galactic Center hosts the densest known stellar environment in the Milky Way, dominated by the massive black hole Sgr A* and the surrounding nuclear star cluster. Theory predicts that this region should also contain a large population of stellar compact objects (SCOs) - black holes, neutron stars, and white dwarfs - forming a "dark cluster" whose distribution and properties remain observationally unconstrained. These unseen stellar remnants are central to questions of mass segregation, cluster dynamics, and the expected rate of extreme mass ratio inspirals (EMRIs) detectable by future gravitational-wave observatories including LISA. Current evidence for SCOs in the Galactic Center is indirect, relying on dynamical mass measurements, X-ray surveys, and a small number of transient sources. Direct detections remain elusive due to crowding, extinction, and the sensitivity limits of existing instruments. We explore how upcoming facilities, in particular the Extremely Large Telescope (ELT) with its first-light imager MICADO, can fundamentally transform this field. MICADO's combination of deep photometry, high spatial resolution, and precise astrometry will enable systematic searches for SCO-star binaries via photometric variability and orbital astrometric signatures, as well as direct detection of isolated accreting black holes interacting with the gas-rich Galactic Center environment. We outline the observational pathways, technical challenges, and expected sensitivities, showing that ELT/MICADO observations can provide the first quantitative constraints on the dark cluster population. Establishing these constraints will be pivotal for understanding the dynamical evolution of the Galactic Center, the role of compact remnants in nuclear star clusters, and the astrophysical context of gravitational-wave sources in galactic nuclei.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了利用ELT/MICADO望远镜直接观测银河系中心致密天体（黑洞、中子星、白矮星）的可行性，旨在为长期未解的"暗星团"问题提供首个定量约束。
AI.motivation: 银河系中心理论上存在大量恒星致密天体（SCOs），但受限于观测手段，其分布和性质至今未得到直接观测证实，这限制了我们对质量分层、星团动力学以及未来引力波源（EMRIs）的理解。
AI.method: 系统分析ELT/MICADO望远镜的深度测光、高空间分辨率和精确天体测量能力，提出通过搜寻SCO-恒星双星的光变与轨道信号，以及直接探测孤立吸积黑洞的观测路径，并评估技术挑战与预期灵敏度。
AI.result: ELT/MICADO的观测能力有望首次对银河系中心的暗星团种群提供定量约束，突破当前仅依赖间接证据（动力学测量、X射线巡天、暂现源）的局限。
AI.conclusion: 建立暗星团约束对理解银河系中心动力学演化、致密残骸在核星团中的作用以及星系核引力波源的物理背景至关重要。

title: Direct Evidence of Non-Ideal Dissipative Dynamics in Solar Wind Magnetic Switchbacks
summary: Magnetic switchbacks, large-amplitude, localized Alfvenic like rotations of the solar wind magnetic field, have been the subject of intensive investigation, with approximately 200 refereed papers published in the last decade. Yet, fundamental controversies persist regarding whether switchbacks can be described with Ideal MHD (magnetohydrodynamic) physics or Hall-MHD physics and whether their origin is at the solar surface or in the solar wind. To settle these controversies, we present Parker Solar Probe electric field measurements between 13 and 40 solar radii, which show that switchbacks have non-zero electric fields in the plasma frame, a finding that definitively settles the physics controversy by proving that switchbacks are Hall-MHD, not Ideal MHD, structures. Along with these electric fields, there are enhanced Poynting vectors having three components with similar magnitudes that exist only inside the switchbacks. These facts contradict the view of switchbacks as simple outward-propagating pulses. Together, they resolve one controversy by showing that switchbacks in the young solar wind are a non-MHD process. They contribute to the second (source) controversy by identifying switchbacks as sites of active, in-situ, evolution. These findings provide a new framework for understanding energy transport and dissipation in astrophysical plasmas.

AI.tldr: 本文通过帕克太阳探测器的电场测量数据，证明太阳风中的磁开关（switchbacks）是霍尔磁流体力学（Hall-MHD）结构而非理想MHD结构，并发现其内部存在增强的庞廷矢量，表明开关是非MHD过程且在原位活跃演化。
AI.motivation: 解决关于磁开关（switchbacks）的两大基本争议：1）它们是否可以用理想MHD或Hall-MHD物理描述；2）它们的起源是在太阳表面还是在太阳风中。
AI.method: 利用帕克太阳探测器在13至40个太阳半径范围内测量的电场数据，分析磁开关的等离子体参考系中的电场特性及其伴随的庞廷矢量。
AI.result: 磁开关在等离子体参考系中具有非零电场，证明其是Hall-MHD结构而非理想MHD结构；开关内部存在三个分量幅值相近的增强庞廷矢量，太阳风中的开关是非MHD过程，且是活跃的原位演化位点。
AI.conclusion: 这些发现排除了开关是简单向外传播脉冲的观点，解决了相关争议，并为理解天体等离子体中的能量输运和耗散提供了新框架。

title: Beyond AI as Assistants: Toward Autonomous Discovery in Cosmology
comment: 4 pages, 2 figures, Contribution to the 2026 Cosmology session of the 60th Rencontres de Moriond
summary: Recent advances in artificial intelligence (AI) agents are pushing AI beyond tools toward autonomous scientific discovery. We discuss two complementary agentic systems for cosmology: \texttt{CMBEvolve}, which targets tasks with explicit quantitative objectives through LLM-guided code evolution and tree search, and \texttt{CosmoEvolve}, which targets open-ended scientific workflows through a virtual multi-agent research laboratory. As preliminary demonstrations, we apply \texttt{CMBEvolve} to out-of-distribution detection in weak-lensing maps, where it iteratively improves the benchmark score through code evolution, and \texttt{CosmoEvolve} to autonomous ACT DR6 data analysis, where it identifies non-trivial pair- and scale-dependent behaviour and produces analysis-grade diagnostics. These examples show how cosmology can provide both controlled benchmark tasks and realistic open-ended research problems for the development of AI scientist systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了两种用于宇宙学的AI智能体系统：CMBEvolve（通过LLM引导的代码演化和树搜索处理定量任务）和CosmoEvolve（通过虚拟多智能体研究实验室处理开放式科学工作流），并在弱引力透镜异常检测和ACT DR6数据分析中展示了初步效果。
AI.motivation: 推动AI从工具向自主科学发现进化，探索AI智能体在宇宙学研究中的应用潜力。
AI.method: 提出两种互补系统：CMBEvolve结合LLM引导的代码演化和树搜索来优化定量指标；CosmoEvolve构建虚拟多智能体研究实验室以处理开放式科学工作流。
AI.result: CMBEvolve在弱引力透镜异常检测中通过代码演化迭代提升了基准分数；CosmoEvolve在ACT DR6数据分析中自主识别了非平凡的尺度和成对依赖行为，并生成了分析级诊断。
AI.conclusion: 宇宙学既能提供受控的基准测试任务，也能提供真实的开放式研究问题，为AI科学家系统的发展提供了理想的试验场。

title: Denoising Interferometric Observations Using Visibilities-Informed Neural Networks
summary: The upcoming observations from the Square Kilometer Array Observatory will provide the astronomical community with a wealth of observations of important objects at long wavelengths. Full analysis of these outputs will necessitate specialized methods and software. Using synthetic observations of protoplanetary discs as an example, we present a machine learning-based visibilities-informed reconstruction for enhanced observations (VIREO) method for denoising data. This method explicitly provides a denoising U-Net with the interferometric observation's point spread function as both an additional input and term in the model's loss function. VIREO outperforms traditional cleaning methods and PSF-ignorant denoising models by producing data that is quantitatively cleaner and more conducive to analysis of the planets within the disc. Applying VIREO to archival ALMA data creates images with significantly less background noise, while maintaining, and in some cases enhancing, the substructure. By demonstrating the general utility of visibility-informed models, our results suggest that VIREO is generally applicable across the interferometric observatories.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于机器学习的可见度信息重建增强观测（VIREO）方法，用于对干涉观测数据进行去噪。该方法通过向U-Net去噪模型输入干涉仪的点扩散函数（PSF）并将其纳入损失函数，显著优于传统cleaning方法和忽略PSF的去噪模型。VIREO在处理原行星盘合成观测和ALMA档案数据时均表现出色，能有效降低背景噪声并增强亚结构，表明该方法在干涉观测中具有广泛适用性。
AI.motivation: 即将到来的平方公里阵列天文台（SKAO）将在长波段提供大量观测数据，但这些数据的全面分析需要专门的方法和软件。传统方法在面对高噪声数据时性能有限，因此需要开发更有效的去噪和图像重建技术来充分利用这些观测资源。
AI.method: 以原行星盘的合成观测为例，提出VIREO方法：将干涉仪的点扩散函数（PSF）作为额外输入提供给U-Net去噪模型，同时在模型损失函数中也加入PSF项，从而让模型能够感知并利用干涉仪特有的成像特性进行去噪。
AI.result: VIREO在定量清洁度和对盘内行星的分析便利性上均优于传统cleaning方法以及忽略PSF的去噪模型；应用于ALMA档案数据时，能显著降低背景噪声，同时保持甚至增强亚结构。
AI.conclusion: VIREO方法展示了可见度信息（尤其是PSF）在去噪模型中的通用价值，表明该方法可广泛应用于各类干涉观测设备。

title: A Climate-Constrained Bayesian Inverse Method for JWST Rocky Exoplanet Eclipse Spectra: A Case Study of LTT 1445A b
summary: Determining whether temperate rocky exoplanets orbiting M stars retain atmospheres is currently a central goal of exoplanet astronomy. To this end, the James Webb Space Telescope has begun searching for atmospheres on these worlds with MIRI secondary eclipse spectroscopy and photometry. Here, we develop a novel climate-constrained Bayesian inference framework that yields atmospheric pressure and composition constraints from these datasets, while accounting for planetary, stellar, and model uncertainties. Our approach fits observations with model spectra derived from self-consistent pressure-temperature profiles at radiative-convective equilibrium, thus maximizing the information extracted from the data and providing more robust inferences than retrievals that use parameterized pressure-temperature profiles. We demonstrate the framework on the existing MIRI LRS eclipse spectrum of LTT 1445A b (1.34 $R_\oplus$ and $T_{\mathrm{eq}} \approx 431$ K). An atmosphere does not need to be invoked to explain the data, meaning a bare rock model produces an adequate fit. If the planet has an atmosphere, the $2σ$ upper limits on surface partial pressures are $\lesssim 1$ bar for an optically thin gas like O$_2$, N$_2$ or CO, $\lesssim0.1$ bar for CO$_2$, $\lesssim 10^{-3}$ bar for H$_2$O, and $\lesssim 10^{-4}$ bar for SO$_2$. Scheduled MIRI F1500W observations could detect one of the thicker atmospheres permitted by the existing data (1 bar O$_2$ and 0.01 bar CO$_2$), if a precision of 20 ppm or better is achieved. This case study demonstrates that climate-constrained Bayesian inversion can turn rocky-planet eclipse spectra into the quantitative constraints necessary to test population-level atmospheric retention hypothesis, like the cosmic shoreline.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个气候约束的贝叶斯推断框架，用于从MIRI次级日食光谱数据中约束温带岩质系外行星的大气压力和成分，并以LTT 1445A b为例展示了该方法的应用，发现裸岩模型即可拟合数据，并给出了大气成分的上限约束。
AI.motivation: 确定温带岩质行星（尤其是围绕M星运行的）是否拥有大气层是当前系外行星天文学的核心目标，JWST已开始利用MIRI次级日食光谱搜索这些世界的大气信号，因此需要一种能够从这些数据中提取定量约束的稳健推断方法。
AI.method: 开发了一种气候约束的贝叶斯推断框架，使用来自辐射-对流平衡下自洽压力-温度剖面的模型光谱拟合观测数据，同时处理行星、恒星和模型的不确定性，从而比使用参数化压力-温度剖面的检索方法提供更可靠的推断。
AI.result: 对LTT 1445A b的MIRI LRS日食光谱分析表明，裸岩模型足以拟合数据；若存在大气，2σ上限为：光学薄气体（O₂、N₂、CO）≤1 bar，CO₂≤0.1 bar，H₂O≤10⁻³ bar，SO₂≤10⁻⁴ bar。计划的F1500W观测可能检测到1 bar O₂+0.01 bar CO₂的大气（若精度达20 ppm）。
AI.conclusion: 气候约束的贝叶斯反演可将岩质行星的日食光谱转化为定量约束，用于检验群体级别的大气保留假说（如宇宙海岸线）。

title: Observation of spontaneous N-bearing PAH formation using ion trap: a new formation pathway in the interstellar medium
summary: Nitrogen-bearing polycyclic aromatic hydrocarbons (N-PAHs) are key precursors to complex organic molecules in both the interstellar medium and the nitrogen-rich planetary atmospheres. Despite the recent detections of nitrogen-functionalized astromolecules, their formation pathways remain an open question. The discrepancies between their predicted and observed abundances point to unknown mechanism that govern their evolution in the astrophysical environments. Employing an ion trap technique and electronic structure calculations, we unravel multiple barrier-less reactions between gas-phase pyrimidine cations (C$_4$H$_4$N$_2^+$) and acetylene (C$_2$H$_2$) which form an hitherto unreported endocyclic- N-PAHs (C$_8$H$_7$N$_2^+$). The present measurements on reactions involving a double-nitrogen subsituted aromatic heterocycle have implications to the astrochemistry of both the Titan's atmosphere and interstellar medium.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过离子阱实验和电子结构计算，揭示了嘧啶阳离子与乙炔之间多个无势垒反应，生成此前未知的环内氮掺杂多环芳烃，对土卫六大气和星际介质中复杂有机分子的形成具有重要意义。
AI.motivation: 含氮多环芳烃是星际介质和富氮行星大气中复杂有机分子的关键前体，但其形成途径尚不明确，预测与观测丰度之间的差异表明存在未知的形成机制。
AI.method: 采用离子阱技术结合电子结构计算，研究气相嘧啶阳离子（C₄H₄N₂⁺）与乙炔（C₂H₂）之间的反应。
AI.result: 发现多个无势垒反应路径，生成了此前未曾报道的环内氮掺杂多环芳烃（C₈H₇N₂⁺）。
AI.conclusion: 双氮取代芳香杂环的反应研究对理解土卫六大气和星际介质中的天体化学过程具有重要启示。

title: JWST COMPASS Program: The 3--5$μ$m transmission spectrum of LTT 1445 A b
summary: The search for an atmosphere on the closest rocky M dwarf planet, LTT 1445 A b, has been the subject of intense investigation from both the ground and space. Here, we present the first JWST transmission spectrum of LTT 1445 A b using a single visit spanning 3-5~$μ$m using NIRSpec/G395H. We conduct two independent reductions of the data using both the Eureka! and ExoTiC-JEDI pipelines. Overall, we measure the NRS1 transit depths to a median precision of $\sim23$~ppm in 41 spectroscopic channels with uniform widths of 30 pixels ($\sim$ 0.02 $μ$m), and the NRS2 transit depths to $\sim36$~ppm precision in 65 spectroscopic channels, also with uniform widths of 30 pixels. We rule out any statistically significant spectral features at this precision and place limits on atmospheric metallicity using a grid of chemical equilibrium models with grey opaque clouds. Using NIRSpec/G395H alone, we can place limits on the atmospheric metallicity of $\gtrsim350~\times$ Solar when the opaque pressure level is greater than 0.01~bars. We also conduct a combined analysis of JWST/NIRSpec and HST/WFC3 transmission data and find our atmospheric limits can be extended $\gtrsim500~\times$ Solar when considering both datasets. Future analyses both in transit and emission will uncover whether there are detectable atmospheric features.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用JWST NIRSpec/G395H首次观测了岩石质M矮星行星LTT 1445 A b的透射光谱，未发现显著的大气特征，并对其大气金属丰度给出了上限约束。
AI.motivation: 寻找距离最近的岩石质M矮星行星LTT 1445 A b的大气层是地面和空间观测的重要课题。
AI.method: 使用JWST NIRSpec/G395H在3-5μm波段进行单次观测，采用Eureka!和ExoTiC-JEDI两条管线独立处理数据，结合化学平衡模型与灰色不透明云层约束大气金属丰度。
AI.result: NRS1在41个光谱通道中达到~23 ppm中位精度，NRS2在65个通道中达到~36 ppm精度；未发现统计显著的光谱特征。单独NIRSpec数据可限制金属丰度≥350倍太阳，联合HST/WFC3数据可扩展至≥500倍太阳。
AI.conclusion: 当前精度下未探测到LTT 1445 A b的明显大气信号，未来需结合凌星和发射光谱进一步研究。

title: Self-Interacting Dark Matter in Brown Dwarfs
summary: Brown dwarfs, being transitional objects between giant planets and low-mass stars, possess dense, cool interiors that provide optimal conditions to explore non-standard physics. Capture and accumulation of dark-matter particles can alter the thermal, structural and dynamic of these substellar objects. We aim to apply a self-consistent two-fluid framework to model the internal structure of self-gravitating brown dwarfs and to quantify how the presence of a dark-matter component modifies their mass--radius relations and dynamical properties. The brown dwarf is modeled as a composite system of a baryonic fluid, described by a polytropic equation of state, and an independent dark-matter fluid. Both components are coupled through their shared gravitational potential in hydrostatic equilibrium. We solve numerically the coupled Lane-Emden equations for a range of dark-matter mass fractions. We find that dark matter accumulating in the core reshapes the baryonic density profile, modifying both the radius and the second-order Love number. Radius and dynamical anomalies in brown dwarfs can serve as diagnostic tools to constrain dark-matter properties. Future high-precision astrometric missions could identify these structural signatures, establishing brown dwarfs as possible detectors of dark matter in the Galaxy.

AI.tldr: 本文通过双流体自洽框架模型，研究了暗物质粒子俘获对棕矮星内部结构、质量-半径关系及动力学性质的影响，发现暗物质堆积会重塑重子密度分布并改变半径和Love数，提出棕矮星可作为探测银河系暗物质的新工具。
AI.motivation: 棕矮星作为行星与恒星之间的过渡天体，其致密低温的内部为探索非标准物理（如暗物质）提供了理想条件。现有研究尚未充分量化暗物质组分对棕矮星结构和动力学性质的影响。
AI.method: 建立双流体自洽框架：将棕矮星建模为由多方状态方程描述的重子流体与独立暗物质流体组成的复合系统，两者通过共享引力势在流体静力学平衡下耦合。数值求解耦合的Lane-Emden方程，扫描不同暗物质质量分数。
AI.result: 暗物质在核心积聚会重塑重子密度分布，同时改变棕矮星的半径和二阶Love数。半径和动力学异常可作为诊断暗物质性质的工具。
AI.conclusion: 未来高精度天体测量任务有望识别这些结构特征，从而将棕矮星确立为银河系中潜在的暗物质探测器。

title: Boundary-supported radial layering in Hoag-like ring galaxies
comment: 5 pages, 3 figures; submitted to MNRAS Letters
summary: Clean Hoag-like ring galaxies are often characterized by an old compact central component, a depleted gap, and a detached outer ring. We identify a boundary-supported radial-layering mechanism in a shell-deformed Kepler control model. A compact inner boundary supplies the core state, while a localized effective shell deformation, interpreted as the reduced imprint of externally supplied material settled near a finite circularization radius, needs to create only an internal maximum and a subsequent outer minimum. These act as the gap barrier and ring-supporting well. The onset of this structure is organized by a saddle-node threshold of the critical-point equation. In a 10^4-point Monte Carlo scan, shell-localized boundary-supported candidates occupy finite parameter volume under the adopted priors, and none of the localized candidates contains an ordered interior minimum--maximum--minimum subsequence. The same branch gives a scale-free gap-to-ring interval overlapping representative ratios for Hoag's Object, UGC 4599, and PGC 1000714, but not for the environmentally processed comparison object JO171.

AI.tldr: 本文通过壳变形开普勒控制模型，识别出一种边界支撑的径向分层机制，解释了清洁Hoag-like环星系的形成。该机制通过紧致内边界和局部壳变形产生间隙屏障和环支撑阱，并成功复现了Hoag天体、UGC 4599和PGC 1000714的尺度无关间隙-环间隔比，但不适用于环境处理的JO171。
AI.motivation: 理解清洁Hoag-like环星系的形成机制，特别是其核心-间隙-环结构的物理起源。
AI.method: 采用壳变形开普勒控制模型，通过边界支撑的径向分层机制，结合10^4点蒙特卡洛扫描和临界点方程的鞍-结阈值分析。
AI.result: 边界支撑候选解占据有限参数体积，无有序的内部极值子序列；该机制成功复现了三个目标天体的间隙-环间隔比，但不适用于JO171。
AI.conclusion: 该径向分层机制为清洁Hoag-like环星系提供了一种普适的形成解释，但环境处理会改变其结构特征。

title: DREAMS. JWST Spectroscopy of a $z=8.3$ Galaxy with an ALMA Dust Continuum Detection: Early Dust, Very High $T_{\rm dust}$, and a Multi-wavelength [OIII] Ratio Discrepancy
summary: We present a deep DREAMS JWST/NIRSpec MSA medium-grating spectrum of MACS0416-Y1, a galaxy at $z=8.312$ with the highest-redshift ALMA dust continuum detection to date, in order to characterize its properties together with archival IFU and ALMA data. The deep NIRSpec spectrum reveals a broad H$β$ line with a width of $\sim1100$ km s$^{-1}$. We interpret it as a broad-line AGN whose line diagnostics are consistent with AGN activity across its clumpy structure, given the absence of little red dot signatures. MACS0416-Y1 clearly shows [OIII]4363 emission, suggesting a moderately low metallicity of $12+\log(\mathrm{O/H})=7.86^{+0.09}_{-0.08}$ ($0.15~Z_\odot$). The combination of [CII]158$μ$m and dust continuum emission indicates low dust mass ratios of $\log (M_{\rm dust}/M_{\rm gas})=-3.60^{+0.29}_{-0.22}$ and $\log (M_{\rm dust}/M_{\rm metal})=-0.95^{+0.29}_{-0.20}$. Because the metallicity of MACS0416-Y1 is around the critical metallicity of $0.1\textrm{-}0.2~Z_\odot$, the system is expected to undergo dust growth, explaining these low dust mass ratios as well as its small dust mass, $M_{\rm dust}\sim10^6~M_\odot$. The intense UV radiation from the AGN may contribute to a high dust temperature of $T_{\rm dust}\simeq 91^{+62}_{-35}$ K, boosting the dust-continuum emission above the ALMA detection limit despite the small $M_{\rm dust}$ at $z>8$. We find a very high total flux ratio of [OIII]88$μ$m/[OIII]5007 = $0.26 \pm 0.06$ in MACS0416-Y1, above predictions from single ionized nebular models at any electron density. This discrepancy suggests that the [OIII]88$μ$m and [OIII]5007 trace largely distinct regions, with the optical line suppressed in dusty nebulae, and thus requires careful interpretation when combining optical and infrared emission lines in JWST+ALMA studies.

AI.tldr: 本文利用JWST/NIRSpec和ALMA数据，对红移z=8.312的星系MACS0416-Y1进行分析，发现其存在宽线AGN、低金属丰度、低尘埃质量比以及高尘埃温度，并揭示了[OIII]88μm与[OIII]5007谱线追踪不同区域的现象。
AI.motivation: 为了理解早期宇宙中星系的物理性质，特别是尘埃形成与AGN活动的关系，以及高红移星系中光学与红外发射谱线的诊断差异。
AI.method: 利用JWST/NIRSpec MSA中分辨光谱结合ALMA尘埃连续谱和[OIII]88μm线数据，分析宽Hβ线、[OIII]4363线、[CII]158μm线及尘埃连续谱，进行金属丰度、尘埃质量比、尘埃温度等物理量的估算。
AI.result: 发现宽Hβ线(~1100 km/s)指示AGN；金属丰度约0.15倍太阳丰度；尘埃与气体质量比极低(~10^{-3.6})；尘埃温度较高(~91K)；[OIII]88μm/[OIII]5007流量比(0.26)超出单电离星云模型预测。
AI.conclusion: MACS0416-Y1是一个包含AGN的低金属丰度、低尘埃质量的早期星系，其AGN辐射可能加热尘埃使其可被ALMA探测；光学与红外[OIII]线可能来自不同区域，联合使用JWST和ALMA数据时需要谨慎。

title: Probing the IMF in the Early Universe -- Direct measurements in the Boötes I UFD with JWST/NIRCam
summary: The dependence of the stellar initial mass function (IMF) on star-formation environment, particularly at low metallicities and high redshifts, remains poorly constrained. Ultra-faint dwarf galaxies (UFDs) are local fossils of high-redshift galaxies hosting old, metal-poor populations, and their resolved stellar populations provide unique pathways to constrain the sub-solar IMF. We investigate the low-mass IMF in the Boötes I (Boo I) UFD with JWST/NIRCam, leveraging its capability to resolve over 10,000 stars reaching $\lesssim0.15 M_{\odot}$, obtaining one of the largest, deepest resolved stellar samples for UFDs. We explore three different functional forms of the IMF with machine learning and statistical techniques, combining forward modeling of synthetic color-magnitude diagrams with simulation-based inference. We find that a single power-law IMF fails to reproduce the observed luminosity function and also deviates from the canonical Salpeter IMF. Our best-fit broken power-law and lognormal IMF parameters are consistent with the Milky Way within 68% confidence level, providing evidence that star formation at metallicities as low as [Fe/H]$\approx-2.4$ follows a similar IMF as in the Milky Way. By treating Boo I as a local relic analogous to a high-redshift galaxy with a stellar mass of $\lesssim10^5 M_{\odot}$ at $z\gtrsim6$, our results provide evidence for the universality of the IMF across both local and high-redshift environments.

AI.tldr: 本文通过JWST/NIRCam观测超暗矮星系Boötes I，利用机器学习与模拟推断方法分析其低质量恒星初始质量函数（IMF），发现其与银河系IMF在68%置信水平内一致，为IMF在低金属丰度及高红移环境中的普适性提供了证据。
AI.motivation: 恒星初始质量函数（IMF）在低金属丰度和高红移等不同恒星形成环境中的依赖性尚不清楚，而超暗矮星系（UFDs）作为高红移星系的局域化石，为约束亚太阳质量IMF提供了独特途径。
AI.method: 利用JWST/NIRCam分辨Boötes I中超10,000颗恒星（质量低至0.15 M☉），结合三种不同函数形式的IMF模型，采用正向建模合成颜色-星等图与基于模拟的推断技术，并使用机器学习方法进行参数估计。
AI.result: 单幂律IMF无法再现观测光度函数，且偏离经典Salpeter IMF；最佳拟合的断裂幂律和对数正态IMF参数在68%置信水平上与银河系IMF一致，表明在[Fe/H]≈-2.4的极低金属丰度下，恒星形成仍遵循与银河系相似的IMF。
AI.conclusion: 通过将Boo I视为红移z≳6、恒星质量≲10⁵ M☉的高红移星系局域遗迹，研究结果为IMF在局域与高红移环境中的普适性提供了证据。

title: Identifying group galaxies merging with massive clusters using machine learning
comment: Accepted for publication in MNRAS. 18 pages, 17 figures
summary: The environment plays a critical role in galaxy evolution, with galaxy clusters and their infall regions offering diverse conditions that shape galaxies before they enter the dense cluster core, a process known as ``pre-processing''. However, identifying environmental substructures, particularly galaxy groups in these transitional zones, remains challenging due to projection effects and ``fingers-of-god'' distortions. In this work, we present a supervised machine learning framework for classifying galaxies into three environmental categories: main cluster, group, and neither, using observable galaxy properties such as positions, line-of-sight velocities, and stellar mass. The model is trained on mock observations derived from cosmological simulations designed to replicate survey conditions and achieves an overall accuracy and class-size-weighted precision of 81%. The neither and main cluster populations are reliably recovered, whereas group galaxies remain the most challenging to identify, achieving 30% completeness and 76% purity. Within $1\times R_{200}$, classification performance is suppressed, but it improves beyond this radius, reaching 40% completeness and 80% purity. Resampling and thresholding strategies allow the model to be tuned toward either higher purity or higher completeness; in this study, we adopt first-past-the-post thresholding to emphasise purity. Model performance is consistent across cluster masses and dynamical states, and it outperforms both Friends-of-Friends and Gaussian Mixture Modelling. This flexibility makes it well suited to upcoming spectroscopic surveys of cluster infall regions, providing a robust statistical tool for disentangling environmental influences on galaxy evolution.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于监督机器学习的框架，利用星系位置、视向速度和恒星质量等可观测属性，将星系分为主团、星系群和两者皆非三类，用于识别星系团外围结构。模型在模拟数据上总体准确率和加权精度达81%，对星系群识别难度较大（完整度30%，纯度76%），但可通过重采样和阈值调整优化，优于传统方法。
AI.motivation: 星系团及其外围区域提供了多样化的环境条件，星系在进入致密团核前会经历"预处理"过程。然而，由于投影效应和"上帝之指"畸变，识别星系团外围的环境子结构（尤其是星系群）非常困难。现有方法难以有效区分这些过渡区域中的不同环境类别。
AI.method: 采用监督机器学习框架，使用星系位置、视向速度和恒星质量作为特征，将星系分为主团、星系群和两者皆非三类。模型在基于宇宙学模拟生成的模拟观测数据上训练，模拟真实巡天条件。采用先到先得阈值策略以强调纯度，并结合重采样和阈值调整方法优化性能。
AI.result: 模型总体准确率和类别加权精度达81%。主团和"两者皆非"类别恢复良好；星系群最难识别，完整度30%但纯度76%。在1×R200范围内性能受抑制，之外完整度达40%、纯度80%。模型在不同团质量和动力学状态下表现稳定，优于Friends-of-Friends和高斯混合模型。
AI.conclusion: 该机器学习框架为即将开展的光谱巡天项目提供了可靠的统计工具，能够有效解构星系团外围区域的环境影响，灵活性使其可根据实际需求在纯度和完整度之间权衡，适用于研究星系演化中的环境效应。

title: The DESIRED electron temperature relations in star-forming regions of the local Universe
comment: 16 pages, 8 figures, 3 tables (2 longtables online). Accepted for publication in Astronomy and Astrophysics
summary: Aims. We present a homogeneous observational study of electron temperature ($T_{\rm e}$) relations between ionic species: $T_{\rm e}$([N II]), $T_{\rm e}$([O II]), $T_{\rm e}$([O III]), $T_{\rm e}$([S II]), $T_{\rm e}$([S III]) and $T_{\rm e}$([Ar III]), using 699 spectra of Galactic and extragalactic H II regions and local star-forming galaxies (SFGs). Methods. We use the DEep Spectra of Ionised REgions Database Extended (DESIRED-E), comprising more than 3000 spectra with direct $T_{\rm e}$ determinations, selecting those with at least two $T_{\rm e}$ diagnostics. We recompute electron density ($n_{\rm e}$) and $T_{\rm e}$ using updated atomic data and a consistent methodology. The resulting $T_{\rm e}$--$T_{\rm e}$ relations are analysed using orthogonal distance regression, quantifying total and intrinsic dispersions and comparing slopes with previous works and photoionisation models. Results. Relations involving low-ionisation $T_{\rm e}$ diagnostics show large intrinsic dispersions, especially for $T_{\rm e}$([O II]) and $T_{\rm e}$([S II]), likely due to sensitivity to $n_{\rm e}$ inhomogeneities, recombination contributions, and uncertainties. In contrast, relations using $T_{\rm e}$([N II]) show lower dispersions, indicating that this diagnostic provides a more reliable estimate of the low-ionisation zone temperature when only higher-ionisation $T_{\rm e}$ diagnostics are available, despite observational difficulties at low metallicity. Overall, slopes agree with model predictions, particularly for relations with low intrinsic dispersion, such as those involving $T_{\rm e}$([N II]) and $T_{\rm e}$([S III]). These results provide a robust empirical basis for estimating $T_{\rm e}$ when limited diagnostics are available.

AI.tldr: 基于699个H II区和星系光谱，系统研究了不同离子探针的电子温度关系，发现[N II]和[S III]的诊断最为可靠，低电离态诊断弥散较大。
AI.motivation: 建立统一的电子温度关系观测研究，为仅有限诊断时提供经验估计基础。
AI.method: 利用DESIRED-E数据库（3000+光谱），选取至少有两个Te诊断的699个样本，更新原子数据统一计算电子密度和温度，采用正交距离回归分析并量化弥散。
AI.result: 低电离态Te（[O II]、[S II]）弥散大，[N II]和[S III]关系弥散小、更可靠；斜率与光致电离模型预测一致。
AI.conclusion: [N II]是低电离区温度的最佳替代诊断，为有限诊断条件下的Te估计提供了可靠的实证基础。

title: Impact of stellar population models on the estimated physical properties of galaxies
comment: 17 pages, 17 figures, Submitted to Astronomy and Astrophysics
summary: Accurate estimates of fundamental physical properties of galaxies, such as star formation rates (SFRs) or stellar masses, are essential for testing and constraining models of galaxy formation and evolution. Spectral energy distribution (SED) modeling has become the standard method for deriving these quantities. However, the influence of the underlying stellar population synthesis (SPS) models on the inferred parameters remains poorly quantified. This work investigates how the choice of SPS models affects the estimation of SFRs and stellar masses derived from SED modeling. Four widely used SPS models are applied to a sample of 17 230 galaxies with spectroscopic redshifts, selected from recently published Hubble Space Telescope and James Webb Space Telescope photometric catalogs. SEDs are modeled using the Code for Investigating GALaxy Emission. The analysis is performed in two steps: (i) estimating galaxy properties with each SPS model, and (ii) employing synthetic catalogs to assess the relative impact of model choice on the recovered parameters. Systematic differences are found among the models, with stellar mass estimates varying by up to ~ 0.6 dex and SFRs by up to ~ 0.4 dex between certain model pairs. The choice of stellar population model introduces significant systematic uncertainties in derived galaxy properties. This dependence should be accounted for when interpreting SED-based measurements and comparing results across different studies of galaxy evolution.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了四种恒星种群合成模型对星系SED建模中恒星质量（差异可达0.6 dex）和恒星形成率（差异可达0.4 dex）估计的系统性影响，强调模型选择是重要的不确定性来源。
AI.motivation: 精确的星系物理参数（如恒星形成率、恒星质量）是检验星系形成与演化模型的基础，但SPS模型选择对参数估计的影响尚未被充分量化。
AI.method: 对17230个具有光谱红移的星系，使用四种SPS模型通过CIGALE代码进行SED建模，分两步分析：先用各模型估计星系参数，再构建合成星表评估模型选择对参数恢复的相对影响。
AI.result: 不同SPS模型间恒星质量估计差异可达0.6 dex，恒星形成率差异可达0.4 dex；模型选择引入了显著的系统性不确定性。
AI.conclusion: 星系参数估计中需要考虑SPS模型选择带来的系统误差，在跨研究比较和结果解释时应将此不确定性纳入考量。
